changes: Upgraded to .NET 10 with Central Package Management for all NuGet dependencies
Migrated from Avalonia.ReactiveUI to ReactiveUI.Avalonia with source generators replacing Fody IL weaving
Cover images are now stored at 2x resolution for sharper display on high-DPI screens
Added version changelog popup that shows once per update with what's new
Added Refresh Series button in settings to mass refresh series data and covers with a searchable picker
Added Refresh Covers toggle in Preferences to re-download covers when refreshing individual series
Added glassmorphism transparent blur effect with a toggle in settings
Added advanced filter builder with chip-based UI for combining multiple search criteria
Added collection stats pie charts for format, demographic, and status distributions
Added splash screen with loading progress during startup
Added Value and Volume Count sort options for the collection
Added dynamic publisher filter that populates from your collection
Expanded currency options to 30+ with proper locale formatting
Added API health check that monitors AniList and MangaDex every 10 minutes and disables features when unavailable
Added user data backup file saved automatically on close
Added toast notification when a series is successfully added
Added multilingual font support for Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Arabic, Thai, and more
AniList API now retries on server errors (HTTP 500) instead of silently failing
Series cards now fade in smoothly on initial load
Added What's New button in settings to review the changelog anytime
actions: Refresh existing series via settings to get higher quality cover images
Re-upload custom covers for sharper display on high-DPI screens
Check settings to enable the glassmorphism blur effect if desired

changes: Fixed series refresh failing for AniList-sourced series whose URLs contain a title slug
Fixed MangaDex cover images not downloading when the API returns cover data as an array
Fixed What's New page showing double 'v' in the version and missing changelog content in MSIX builds
What's New dialog now opens over the settings window instead of closing it
Fixed misleading 'Refresh Covers on Startup' label to clarify it applies to individual series refreshes
What's New dialog now has navigation arrows to browse changelogs from previous versions
actions: Refresh all series via settings to fix any missing cover images

changes: Additional language selections now persist across app restarts
When MangaDex is missing a title in a requested language, a popup lets you enter it manually
Add Series button now shows a spinning loading indicator with the series name while fetching data
Added series notification now displays the title in your preferred language instead of the AniList ID
User data loading is now async so the splash screen stays responsive during startup
Series card +/- and edit buttons now update correctly when switching themes
Improved collection filtering and sorting performance for large libraries
Reduced popup dialog text size for better readability
Refresh button in series editor now refreshes full series data from AniList instead of only updating volume counts
Save button in series editor now saves volume counts along with rating, value, and publisher
Added Auto Generate button in theme settings that generates a color palette from a seed color using the Color API
Theme generation is now significantly faster with batched color updates
Generate buttons no longer require a theme name — preview colors live before saving
Added confirmation dialog before deleting a series or removing a theme
Cover image changes now show success toast or error popup instead of failing silently
Empty cover URL input now shows a helpful message instead of silently doing nothing
Added Repair Data button in settings to fix missing theme colors or corrupted data
Esc key now closes the advanced search popup
Fixed theme colors not applying correctly in MSIX builds for newer theme properties
actions: Use Repair Data in settings if any theme colors appear incorrect after updating

changes: Upgraded Avalonia UI framework to v12 for better rendering performance and smoother scrolling
Upgraded to Font Awesome 7 icons via the actively-maintained Optris.Icons.Avalonia library
Cover images now load lazily as you scroll instead of all at startup — near-instant launch and far lower memory use for large collections
Series cards now individually fade in on load, filter, and search instead of a single page-wide fade
Smoother scrolling on the collection view with bitmap-cached cards and a lighter drop shadow
Currency value field now adapts to the selected currency's decimal format (Yen shows whole numbers, USD shows .00, BHD shows .000)
Stored collection values preserve their digits when switching currencies — 1000.55 USD now displays as 100055 in Yen instead of 1000.55
Total value field in Add/Edit Series now supports larger amounts (two extra digits of capacity, aligned between both windows)
Volumes Read label in Edit Series now shows the current count, matching the total value label
Centered column labels above Cur Vols, Max Vols, Vols Read, Rating, Publisher, Value, and Demographic for cleaner alignment
Importing user data from JSON no longer freezes the UI on large files
App startup is faster — Discord connection now runs in parallel with loading your collection
Startup theme pre-load uses a streaming JSON reader, reducing allocations
actions: If your collection values were entered in a non-USD currency (like Yen or Euro), review the Total Value in Edit Series after updating — the digit-preserving conversion may display differently than before

changes: Currency values now display in the active currency's natural decimal format — a stored value of 2160.00 shows as ¥2,160 in Yen instead of ¥216,000 (reverses the digit-shifting introduced in 2.2.0)
Cover images now decode directly at the target display size instead of loading the full source resolution — faster cover loads and far lower memory use when adding or refreshing series
PNG export for screenshots and cover round-trips uses a pooled buffer manager, reducing GC pressure on large collections
Incomplete filter no longer flags series whose max volume count is unset
Startup theme pre-load and changelog parsing now use source-generated JSON for a faster launch and less allocation churn
Bumped ReactiveUI.Avalonia to 12.0.1 alongside related dependency updates
actions: Open Edit Series for any item whose Total Value was entered in a non-USD currency on 2.2.0 — the value now displays in the currency's natural format and may differ from what you saw before
